title: asplenium × garhwalense nothosubsp. kumaonicum
intro: Asplenium × garhwalense nothosubsp. kumaonicum is a nothosubspecies of the Asplenium garhwalense plant, a fern species belonging to the family Aspleniaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and treating various respiratory issues. Traditionally, A. × garhwalense nothosubsp. kumaonicum is used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, as well as dried extracts that are used in modern medicine.
